query: SELECT DATE(`createdAt`) as d, count(*) as c FROM `download_history` WHERE `createdAt` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(`createdAt`) ORDER BY DATE(`createdAt`) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AU4feyxZpdZ8pZ.root --database 2ZSCuHTjdaVo7h4vqS7dZB --execute SELECT DATE(`createdAt`) as d, count(*) as c FROM `download_history` WHERE `createdAt` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(`createdAt`) ORDER BY DATE(`createdAt`) LIMIT 5;
